description: Your organization is being targeted by a distributed botnet brute-force attack where attackers use hundreds of different IPs to target the same accounts with only a few passwords each. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), create two artifacts in the Search & Reporting app to detect and visualize this activity. First, create a scheduled hourly alert named 'Distributed_Brute_Force_Alert' that queries the 'security_logs' index for failed logins and identifies users targeted by 5 or more distinct source IPs. Second, create a dashboard named 'Botnet_Targeting_Dashboard' containing at least two panels: one showing the most targeted users and their distinct attacking IP counts, and another using the built-in 'iplocation' command to summarize
